name: @jfs/netlify-kit
description: Shared, dependency-free Netlify Functions primitives (CORS + preflight, JSON/text/error responses, capped body reads, input validation, SSRF guards, retry-with-backoff fetch, per-IP rate limiting, a Blobs store opener + short-TTL cache, a createHandler boundary, and a hardened Anthropic (Claude) Messages-API client) extracted from the JFS family of buildless static sites.
author: jsvolos63
